case_title: CHARLES MASONER, INC. VS. CHINESE HISTORICAL SOCIETY OF AMERICA (CHSA) ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON APR-05-2023 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF CHARLES MASONER, INC.'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS.
